title: UniqueDark: Reign Of Nether
description: UniqueDark Style pack, that support Reign Of Nether mod
body:
# 🖤 UniqueDark: Reign of Nether GUI Addon

**Dark. Refined. Infernal.**

> Bring the Reign of Nether experience to perfection with UniqueDark, a sleek and immersive GUI retexture that blends obsidian darkness with golden infernal glow — perfectly matching the atmosphere of the Nether realms.

## ✨ Features

- **🩸 Complete GUI overhaul for Reign of Nether mod interfaces**
  
- **🌑 UniqueDark aesthetic — deep black tones with ember-red and gold highlights**
  
- **🔥 Smooth, minimal buttons and menus inspired by Nether design**
  
- **🪔 Perfectly readable text and icons even in low-light environments**
  
- **⚒️ Fully compatible with Reign of Nether**

## 🧩 Requirements

1. Reign of Nether mod
   
1. Minecraft 1.19 to 1.20
